The '''kirithin''' was an [[Amphibian/Legends|amphibious]] predator found throughout [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Encased in heavy, protective scales, the creature's long front fins were used both for locomotion on land and for hunting prey. It had a feeler-like organ on its head to attract prey, the morsel would then be pulled into the kirithin's waiting maw and sliced with rows of razor-sharp fangs.
